Video.summary: The guys bring the well-known but anemic 305 SBC into the shop by viewer request.
Video.title: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Image.alt: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Video.summary: Pat and Frankie finish building up their jazzed up 305 SBC.
Video.title: Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC

Image.alt: Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC
Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC
Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC

Video.summary: We bring our 305 Small Block Chevy back for a second round of racier upgrades.
Video.title: Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue

Image.alt: Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue
Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue
Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue

Video.summary: We take a stock 305 Chevy and a 302 Ford and find out dollar for horsepower who comes out on top.
Video.title: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Image.alt: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Video.summary: 302 vs 305! Round 2 of the classic debate. Budget head swap dyno test. Which 90's head rules?
Video.title: 302 vs. 305 Round 2

Video.summary: 302 SBF vs. 305 SBC battle: We're increasing compression on both, comparing gains head-to-head!
Video.title: 302 vs 305 Pt 3 High Compression Showdown

Video.summary: We do something never done before: build two engines to run on the dyno at the SAME TIME!
Video.title: Two Engines, One Big Plan

Video.summary: We connect TWO 496 Big Block Chevy engines to the dyno to find out exactly how much power they make.
Video.title: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Image.alt: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Video.summary: We seek more power from our twin-engine setup by reconfiguring the exhaust and phasing the engines.
Video.title: More Double Dyno Tech

Video.summary: Team preps survivor '63 Galaxie for 1/2 mile top-speed assault, installing our turboÆd Black & Blue 347.
Video.title: Galaxie Teardown

Video.summary: A '63 Galaxie is rolled into the shop and fitted with the 347 turbo known as "Little Black & Blue."
Video.title: Galaxie Time Capsule

Video.summary: Team continues the transformation of its turbocharged Æ63 Galaxie into a top-speed terror.
Video.title: Battlestar Galaxie

Video.summary: Team installs 200-mph capable suspension on its 1,000-hp '63 Galaxie
Video.title: Half-Mile Hauler

Video.summary: Mike and Pat have their hands full with the finishing touches on project white fright.
Video.title: The GalaxieÆs Final Frontier

Video.summary: Engine Power embarks on a new project for SCCAÆs inaugural SPEC Mustang class.
Video.title: SCCA SPEC Mustang Part 1

Video.summary: Our SPEC Mustang Project is back for final touches, as we get it ready to hit the track.
Video.title: SCCA SPEC Mustang Part 2

Video.summary: Out of the shop and into the yard!Ā We take a weekend to rebuild a 350ci small block Chevy V8.
Video.title: Backyard Engine Build

Video.summary: We take the 350ci Small Block Chevy built in the parking lot and upgrade short block assembly.
Video.title: Backyard Build Upgrades

Video.summary: We finish our 350 Small Block Chevy with high-performance induction, then put it to the test.
Video.title: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Image.alt: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Video.summary: Eric and Joel unearth the Cummins-crown-jewel dually diesel, a Æ93 Dodge Ram W350.
Video.title: Diesel Diamond in the Rough

Video.summary: The guys inject some power into their B-series Cummins with a VE to P pump swap on their 93 Dodge Dually.
Video.title: Pump It Up

Video.summary: We yank out our old suspension, upgrade the underside of our Diesel Dually, and give new disc brakes.
Video.title: Lift & Shift

Video.summary: Our Dodge Dually, Project Nightshift, will shed its skin today as we buzz off all the imperfections.
Video.title: Prime Time Axle Folly

Video.summary: Get your brushes ready because our Dodge Diesel Dually, Nightshift, is turning to the dark side.
Video.title: One-ton, Two-tone Transformation

Video.summary: We lay down the freshly painted back end on our 1993 Dodge W350.
Video.title: Bedtime

Video.summary: '93 Dodge Dually gets rebuilt transfer case, turbo plumbing, and brake line tips.
Video.title: Project Nightshift: Working Overtime

Video.summary: 1993 Dodge Ram Dually gets wiring fixed, seats installed, door panels refurbished, and a maiden voyage.
Video.title: Project Nightshift Putting in Work

Video.summary: We dust off our Test Sled from the pits of darkness and give it a new life.
Video.title: Test Sled Reincarnated Stage 1

Video.summary: Our Test Sled has been rejuvenated with a new engine & transmission.
Video.title: Test Sled Reincarnated Stage 2

Video.summary: Our Small Block Chevy cracked during a cold snap. So weÆre going to put the guts in a bigger block.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: A Bigger Block

Video.summary: Once we finish assembly on our improved Compression Obsession SBC, weÆll run this mule on the dyno.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: More Power

Video.summary: It's BIGFOOT #1! The legendary truck that started the entire monster truck industry.
Video.title: Bigfoot

Video.summary: In the series launch we take a 1991 Chevy Suburban and transform it into æProject Unbreakable.Æ
Video.title: Project Unbreakable

Video.summary: ItÆs fabrication time on our Chevy Suburban weÆre calling ōUnbreakableö.
Video.title: Fab Four

Video.summary: Our GMC ōUnbreakableö Suburban gets its new suspension.
Video.title: Suburban Suspension

Video.summary: Our ōUnbreakableö Suburban gets its engine and transmission.
Video.title: Unbreakable Nears The Finish

Video.summary: Our Unbreakable Chevy Suburban makes its final preparations for payoff.
Video.title: Unbreakable Readies For The Mountain

Video.summary: The guys put Project Unbreakable, our Æ91 Chevy Suburban, to the test at Adventure Off Road Park!
Video.title: The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road

Image.alt: The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road
The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road
The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road

Video.summary: Come along as we take a massive æ91 GMC Suburban square body and turn it into a lifted off-road beast.
Video.title: An Unbreakable Suburban Transformation

Video.summary: With new wheels and tires and steering upgrade, the guys take their Chevy Suburban for a drive!
Video.title: Unbreakable Suburban Comes To Life

Video.summary: Our 305 Small Block Chevy and 302 Small Block Ford return for another round of the brand loyalty war.
Video.title: Small Block Showdown Round 4

Video.summary: We reinforce our Slant Six with a fully-forged rotating assembly.
Video.title: High Tech Slant Six

Video.summary: We give our Slant Six a huge induction upgrade, a custom EFI system, and a turbocharger.
Video.title: High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted

Image.alt: High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted

Video.summary: Performance upgrades on our 6.7L Ram continue with install of larger intercooler, & gauges.
Video.title: Ram 3500 Stage One: Gauges & Intercooler

Video.summary: The Ram 1 ton dually gets a bigger badder turbo setup with more airflow for more horsepower. Plus, Advanced P
Video.title: Ram Diesel Turbo Swap & Exhaust

Video.summary: Truck Tech's builders compete to see who can build the best muscle truck.
Video.title: Muscle Trux Build Off

Video.summary: We've up'd the horsepower of our 2016 Ram dually with the air side of things, now onto fuel.
Video.title: Ram Diesel Fuel System Upgrades

Video.summary: Ever wonder how a performance transmission can withstand 800 horsepower?
Video.title: Ram 3500 Bullet-Proof Transmission

Video.summary: This is a complete thrash as we turn a Jeep Wagoneer into a 700+ horsepower, two-wheel drive monster.
Video.title: Jeep ōTrashHawkö Readies for the Speedway

Video.summary: We build the foundation of a stroker LS that would be a PERFECT fit for a hot rod!
Video.title: Pro LS Bottom End Build

Video.summary: We complete our stroker LS powerplant and put it to the ultimate performance test in the dyno cell!
Video.title: Pro LS on the Dyno

Video.summary: We're putting together a high-compression 440ci road race engine for Carcass' 1972 Camaro race car!
Video.title: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I

Image.alt: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I

Video.summary: We finish the assembly of our 440 with a conventional SBC bottom end and LS induction.
Video.title: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II

Video.summary: Transforming a junkyard Ford flathead into a classic hot rod V8.

Video.summary: Engine guru Keith Dorton helps build our Ford flathead with 3/4 race cam, high compression heads and 3 deuces.
Video.title: Old Skool Flatty: 3 Deuce V8
